records.question: Which journals have a theme of at Baltimore Ravens and include work classified as Photo?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT journal.journal_id FROM journal
JOIN journal_committee ON journal.journal_id = journal_committee.journal_id
WHERE journal_committee.work_type = 'Photo' AND journal.theme = 'at Baltimore Ravens'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Journal_ID FROM journal AS T1 INNER JOIN journal_committee AS T2 ON T1.Journal_ID = T2.Journal_ID WHERE T1.Theme = 'at Baltimore Ravens' AND T2.Work_Type = 'Photo'

records.question: Which journals have Grażyna Wolszczak as an editor who is at most 54 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT journal.journal_id FROM journal
JOIN journal_committee ON journal.journal_id = journal_committee.journal_id
JOIN editor ON journal_committee.editor_id = editor.editor_id
WHERE editor.age <= 54.0 AND editor.name = 'Grażyna Wolszczak'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Journal_ID FROM journal AS T1 INNER JOIN journal_committee AS T2 ON T1.Journal_ID = T2.Journal_ID INNER JOIN editor AS T3 ON T2.Editor_ID = T3.Editor_ID WHERE T3.Age <= 54.0 AND T3.Name = 'Grażyna Wolszczak'

records.question: Which journals containing September 23 have sales of at least 994 and where the theme is at Jacksonville Jaguars with work_type exactly Article?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT journal.journal_id FROM journal
JOIN journal_committee ON journal.journal_id = journal_committee.journal_id
WHERE journal.date LIKE '%September 23%' AND journal.sales >= 994 AND journal_committee.work_type = 'Article' AND journal.theme = 'at Jacksonville Jaguars'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Journal_ID FROM journal AS T1 WHERE T1.Date LIKE '%September 23%' AND T1.Sales >= 994 AND T1.Theme = 'at Jacksonville Jaguars' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM journal_committee AS T2 WHERE T1.Journal_ID = T2.Journal_ID AND T2.Work_Type = 'Article')

records.pred_sql: SELECT Journal_ID FROM journal WHERE Date LIKE '%2001%' AND Theme = 'Tampa Bay Buccaneers' AND Sales <= 4798

records.question: Which journals containing January 6 with theme Cincinnati Bengals have articles where sales are at most 5342 and the editor named Grażyna Wolszczak is exactly 54 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT journal.journal_id FROM journal
JOIN journal_committee ON journal.journal_id = journal_committee.journal_id
JOIN editor ON journal_committee.editor_id = editor.editor_id
WHERE journal.date LIKE '%January 6%' AND journal.theme = 'Cincinnati Bengals' AND journal_committee.work_type = 'Article' AND journal.sales <= 5342 AND editor.age = 54.0 AND editor.name = 'Grażyna Wolszczak'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Journal_ID FROM journal AS T1 INNER JOIN journal_committee AS T2 ON T1.Journal_ID = T2.Journal_ID INNER JOIN editor AS T3 ON T2.Editor_ID = T3.Editor_ID WHERE T1.Date LIKE '%January 6%' AND T1.Theme = 'Cincinnati Bengals' AND T1.Sales <= 5342 AND T2.Work_Type = 'Article' AND T3.Age = 54.0 AND T3.Name = 'Grażyna Wolszczak'

records.question: Which journal entries have dates containing October 7 and a theme that is at Baltimore Ravens?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT journal.journal_id FROM journal
JOIN journal_committee ON journal.journal_id = journal_committee.journal_id
WHERE journal.date LIKE '%October 7%' AND journal.theme = 'at Baltimore Ravens'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Journal_ID FROM journal AS T1 WHERE T1.Date LIKE '%October 7%' AND T1.Theme = 'at Baltimore Ravens' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM journal_committee AS T2 WHERE T1.Journal_ID = T2.Journal_ID )
